# Done Contract

Purpose: define when a product ship should stop coding instead of looping.

Required fields:
- Must work
- Must be visible
- Must be hidden/deferred
- Required build/test/runtime proof
- Required screenshot proof
- Copy/design standards
- Open known limitations
- Done verdict: DONE, DONE_WITH_NOTES, NOT_DONE

Done means:
- deterministic gates pass
- primary job is usable
- first screen is clear
- secondary depth is reachable
- no obvious overload failure remains

Not done means:
- broken build/test/runtime
- missing primary job
- hidden or unclear primary action
- first screen is overloaded

Done is not the same as taste-approved.
